problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
mechanism: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway
hypothesis: If CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway is applied to colonize, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 36 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
